---
title: "MB5370_Module02_Workshop1"
author: "Katie Dyck"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-02"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

I created a new GitHub repository for this module & connected it to RStudio:

```{r Connect to GitHub}
# in the console:
#   credentials::git_credential_ask()
#   usethis::git_sitrep()

# if error message comes up that default branch is origin when it should be "main", enter this in the console:
#   usethis::git_default_branch_rediscover()

# in the console:
#   usethis::use_git()
#   usethis::use_github()

# in RStudio terminal:
  # git remote add origin https://github.com/katiedyck/MB5370_Module02.git
  # git push -u origin main
  # git push
```

Data files (.csv, .txt, .xlsx) were copied from class repository "R4MarineScience" and added to the data folder in my repository for Module 2.
